data.raceComments: {"comment":"1. NOAH'S OWN wasn't far away at the finish when 4th and beaten only 5 lengths (18.07) at this track. Some good form is emerging from her last run. Has ability and is a key runner. 3. CUTE KARLI missed the frame latest when eighth at this track (18.43) but scored five back at this track (17.85). Key player if finds best. 5. LITTLE BIG GUY missed the placings here last start but is well-placed to make amends.","runners":[1,3,5],"exclusive":false}
